announcements.title: We’re excited to share that our new website is now live! 🎉
announcements.text: This will make it easier for you to learn about our services, check out our calendar, and get in touch with us!

announcements.title: We have some exciting news to share
announcements.text: Little cover Early Learning has officially purchased a building! We are so excited to have a permanent home for our little cove family. We can’t wait to share more details with you soon!
